title: Bajirao Mastani
tmdbOverview: Peshwa Bajirao married to Kashibai, falls in love with Mastani, a warrior princess in distress. They struggle to make their love triumph amid opposition from his conservative family.
synopsis: Released in 2015, Bajirao Mastani is a history, romance and drama film from India. It holds a solid 7.3 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a G certification (IE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
